name: MultiSelect
searchText: multiselect custom searchable multi select @mantine/core /core/multi-select checkiconposition chevroncolor clearbuttonprops clearsearchonchange clearsectionmode clearable comboboxprops data defaultdropdownopened defaultsearchvalue defaultvalue description descriptionprops disabled dropdownopened error errorprops filter hiddeninputprops hiddeninputvaluesdivider hidepickedoptions inputcontainer inputsize inputwrapperorder label labelprops leftsection leftsectionpointerevents leftsectionprops leftsectionwidth limit loading loadingposition maxdropdownheight maxvalues nothingfoundmessage onchange onclear ondropdownclose ondropdownopen onmaxvalues onoptionsubmit onremove onsearchchange openonfocus pointer radius renderoption renderpill required rightsection rightsectionpointerevents rightsectionprops rightsectionwidth scrollareaprops searchvalue searchable selectfirstoptiononchange selectfirstoptionondropdownopen size value withalignedlabels withasterisk withcheckicon witherrorstyles withscrollarea wrapperprops

props.name: checkIconPosition
props.description: Position of the checkmark icon shown next to selected options in the dropdown

props.name: chevronColor
props.description: Controls color of the default chevron

props.name: clearButtonProps
props.description: Props passed down to the clear button

props.name: clearSearchOnChange
props.description: Clear search value when item is selected

props.name: clearSectionMode
props.description: Determines how the clear button and rightSection are rendered

props.name: clearable
props.description: When enabled, displays a clear button to remove all selected values (hidden when component is empty, disabled, or read-only)

props.name: comboboxProps
props.description: Props passed down to Combobox component

props.name: data
props.description: Data used to generate options. Values must be unique, otherwise an error will be thrown and component will not render.

props.name: defaultDropdownOpened
props.description: Uncontrolled dropdown initial opened state

props.name: defaultSearchValue
props.description: Default search value

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled component default value

props.name: description
props.description: Contents of Input.Description component. If not set, description is not displayed.

props.name: descriptionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Description component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets disabled attribute on the input element

props.name: dropdownOpened
props.description: Controlled dropdown opened state

props.name: error
props.description: Contents of Input.Error component. If not set, error is not displayed.

props.name: errorProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Error component

props.name: filter
props.description: Function based on which items are filtered and sorted

props.name: hiddenInputProps
props.description: Props passed down to the hidden input

props.name: hiddenInputValuesDivider
props.description: Divider used to separate values in the hidden input value attribute

props.name: hidePickedOptions
props.description: When enabled, selected options are hidden from the dropdown list

props.name: inputContainer
props.description: Render function to wrap the input element. Useful for adding tooltips, popovers, or other wrappers around the input.

props.name: inputSize
props.description: HTML size attribute for the input element (number of visible characters)

props.name: inputWrapperOrder
props.description: Controls order and visibility of wrapper elements. Only elements included in this array will be rendered.

props.name: label
props.description: Contents of Input.Label component. If not set, label is not displayed.

props.name: labelProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Input.Label component

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the left side of the input

props.name: leftSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the leftSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: leftSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the leftSection element

props.name: leftSectionWidth
props.description: Left section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-left, by default equals to the input height

props.name: limit
props.description: Maximum number of options displayed at a time, Infinity by default

props.name: loading
props.description: Displays loading indicator in the left or right section

props.name: loadingPosition
props.description: Position of the loading indicator

props.name: maxDropdownHeight
props.description: max-height of the dropdown, only applicable when withScrollArea prop is true, 250 by default

props.name: maxValues
props.description: Maximum number of values, no limit if not set

props.name: nothingFoundMessage
props.description: Message displayed when no options match the search query (when searchable is enabled) or when the data array is empty. If not set, the dropdown will be hidden instead.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when value changes

props.name: onClear
props.description: Called when the clear button is clicked

props.name: onDropdownClose
props.description: Called when dropdown closes

props.name: onDropdownOpen
props.description: Called when dropdown opens

props.name: onMaxValues
props.description: Called when user attemps to select more values than allowed

props.name: onOptionSubmit
props.description: Called when option is submitted from dropdown with mouse click or Enter key

props.name: onRemove
props.description: Called with value of the removed item

props.name: onSearchChange
props.description: Called when search changes

props.name: openOnFocus
props.description: Controls whether dropdown opens when the input receives focus

props.name: pointer
props.description: Determines whether the input should have cursor: pointer style. Use when input acts as a button-like trigger (e.g., component="button" for Select/DatePicker).

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: renderOption
props.description: A function to render content of the option, replaces the default content of the option

props.name: renderPill
props.description: A function to render content of the pill

props.name: required
props.description: Adds required attribute to the input and a red asterisk on the right side of label

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Content section displayed on the right side of the input

props.name: rightSectionPointerEvents
props.description: Sets pointer-events styles on the rightSection element. Use 'all' when section contains interactive elements (buttons, links).

props.name: rightSectionProps
props.description: Props passed down to the rightSection element

props.name: rightSectionWidth
props.description: Right section width, used to set width of the section and input padding-right, by default equals to the input height

props.name: scrollAreaProps
props.description: Props passed down to the underlying ScrollArea component in the dropdown

props.name: searchValue
props.description: Controlled search value

props.name: searchable
props.description: Allows searching through options by user input

props.name: selectFirstOptionOnChange
props.description: If set, the first option is selected when value changes, false by default

props.name: selectFirstOptionOnDropdownOpen
props.description: If set, the first option is selected when dropdown opens, false by default

props.name: size
props.description: Controls input height, horizontal padding, and font-size

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled component value

props.name: withAlignedLabels
props.description: If set, unchecked labels are aligned with checked ones

props.name: withAsterisk
props.description: If set, the required asterisk is displayed next to the label. Overrides required prop. Does not add required attribute to the input.

props.name: withCheckIcon
props.description: If set, the check icon is displayed near the selected option label

props.name: withErrorStyles
props.description: Determines whether the input should have red border and red text color when the error prop is set

props.name: withScrollArea
props.description: Determines whether the options should be wrapped with ScrollArea.AutoSize, true by default

props.name: wrapperProps
props.description: Props passed down to the root element
